name: gsd-delivery-team
summary: Phase-based Get Shit Done (GSD) delivery team designed to eliminate context rot via strict cognitive mode switching.

roles.name: principal-architect
roles.responsibility: Phase 1 (Discuss): Lock in the design and architecture before planning begins.
roles.stop_condition: Human operator selects a technical approach.

roles.name: execution-planner
roles.responsibility: Phase 2 (Plan): Break the approved design into atomic, executable tasks.

roles.name: builder
roles.responsibility: Phase 3 (Execute): Orchestrate implementation across fresh context windows.
roles.stop_condition: All tasks in the plan are completed.

roles.name: qa-and-review
roles.responsibility: Phase 4 (Review & Gate): Paranoid code review and E2E validation.
roles.stop_condition: Zero critical bugs found and E2E tests pass.

collapse_condition: Never collapse. GSD strictly mandates phase separation.
escalate_condition: Always escalate. Each phase MUST use a fresh context window to prevent context rot.
